description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat, dark gray roof featuring two prominent rectangular skylights or solar panels. The exterior walls are a light, neutral color, likely concrete or stucco, and the house is surrounded by a mix of coniferous and deciduous trees, some with dense green foliage and others with white, possibly snow-covered leaves. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern on both floors, and the main entryway is centrally located on the longer side of the house, marked by a simple door and a small set of steps. The house has a modern, minimalist architectural style with clean lines and no ornate detailing. The surrounding trees suggest a suburban or park-like setting, providing a natural buffer around the structure.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat gray roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entryway, surrounded by a mix of green and white-leaved trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and a clear arrangement of surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the spacing of trees on either side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows and the dense arrangement of trees behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side door, flat roof, and a mix of tree types flanking the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small steps, minimalistic and unadorned
